name: First Lady Jacque Batt's Turketti Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Grated cheddar cheese (adjust to personal preference)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti, drain well.
2. Mix all ingredients except cheese in a bowl.
3. Pour mixture into a greased casserole dish.
4. Cover with grated cheese.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
